'''Broadside''' was the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] at the [[Starboard Broadside Club]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] aboard ''[[Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport/Legends|Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport]]''. He was overweight, and several patches of hair were missing due to scars from injuries sustained during his life as a [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]]. Rumor was he had fought alongside [[Omze'kehr Kahr|Omze]] in the gladiator pits of [[Loovria/Legends|Loovria]]. He kept peace in his club by using his immense strength and a large metal pipe he kept behind the bar.<ref name="PSG" />
